sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66262" key="me/nandros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μέν-ανδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66262.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">awaiting a man</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παρθένος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dionys.</author> </bibl> </cit> Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0084.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
